Entity Profile
P

Taja Gavaris

Person · First seen 3305-03-15 · 5 mentions
Active: 3305-03-15 → 3305-04-20
Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3305-04-20
Taja Gavaris Resigns as Rackham CFO
Rackham Capital Investments CFO Taja Gavaris unexpectedly resigns and emigrates from Federal space along with loyal employees, with journalist Bryanna Blanco alleging Rackham used imposter FIA agents to blackmail her.
3305-04-04
Rackham Under Investigation
The Federal Times cooperates with a Federal Intelligence Agency investigation into Rackham Capital Investments, with journalist Bryanna Blanco highlighting concerns about Taja Gavaris's suspicious rise through the company.
3305-03-29
Second Fatality in Rackham Conflict
Rackham Capital's head of personnel Derrin O'Shea dies in a limousine 'accident', becoming the second senior executive to die since Taja Gavaris's arrival, with journalist Bryanna Blanco drawing parallels to pirate power struggles.
3305-03-23
Pirate History of Taja Gavaris Unveiled
Journalist Bryanna Blanco reveals that new CFO Taja Gavaris was once a pirate rival of Zachary Rackham, alleging she blackmailed her way into his organisation and is now eliminating his loyal supporters to seize control.
3305-03-15
Rackham Fatality Creates Power Struggle
The sudden death of CFO Aaron Salazar creates a power vacuum at Rackham Capital Investments, with the mysterious Taja Gavaris installed as his replacement amid speculation that she is manoeuvring to oust CEO Zachary Rackham.
